name: Seared Scallops with Cucumber-Pepper Relish
recipeIngredient: Serrano Pepper, Red, Deveined and Minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice lemon grass crosswise.
2. Peel cucumbers and halve them lengthwise, then remove seeds and slice thin crosswise.
3. Relish: In a saucepan, combine lemon grass, vinegar, sugar, red pepper flakes, and 1/2 cup water. Bring to a boil and simmer until reduced to 1/2 cup. Strain into a bowl and let cool slightly before discarding solids.
4. Stir in all remaining sauce ingredients.
5. Sprinkle scallops with 1/2 teaspoon salt and 1/4 teaspoon white pepper.
6. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a wok or non-stick skillet. Cook scallops, turning once, until seared. Add more oil as needed to prevent overcrowding.
